TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nicolás Maduro ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Nicolás Maduro, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1962) mrhuw Venezuela ta' misuw hya' ga Nicolás Maduro, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: niʦ~ʨol*s~ɕ ma*uro rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, niʦ~ʨol*s~ɕ ma*uro, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *enezuela taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa niʦ~ʨol*s~ɕ ma*uro, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Nicolás Maduro ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Nicolás Maduro, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1962) mrhuw Venezuela ta' misuw hya' ga Nicolás Maduro, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: niʦ~ʨol*s~ɕ ma*uro rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, niʦ~ʨol*s~ɕ ma*uro, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *enezuela taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa niʦ~ʨol*s~ɕ ma*uro, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
